reviews.review_description: Picked this up on sale and wasn't disappointed by the amount of content—350 levels is impressive. The puzzles are enjoyable but lacked a real challenge for me; I'd recommend this primarily for kids or anyone looking for a low-stress game to unwind with.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review—I really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts and feedback 🤗

reviews.review_description:
This is similar to a game I played on the computer  which was fun but this game the levels are small and not very  challenging.
 It has potential so I hope they developer 
Keeps working on it.

reviews.review_title: Fun VR Game with Shooting Puzzles
reviews.review_description: The puzzles in this game are really well-designed and add a lot to the experience. They’re challenging enough to make you think, but not so hard that you get stuck for too long. Solving them in VR makes it even more immersive. If you enjoy puzzles, this game does a great job of balancing them with the action!

developer_response.body: 🙌🎉 💖 Thanks for the feedback, happy to hear that you enjoy the game 💖 🎉🙌

reviews.review_description: We cannot figure this game out there are no instructions .  We run out of bullets and game over. No way to get more.  Please pass some instructions over or I will be asking for a refund. Thanks

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Please update to 39.0, this newer version has instructions and a few improved features.
Happy gaming 😊

reviews.review_title: Old-school puzzles in VR is a must have!
reviews.review_description: This game is super fun and brings back the classic arcade feel. Definitely worth the price for anyone who loves old-school puzzles wrapped in VR with shooting adventure!

developer_response.body: 🙌 🎉💖 Thanks for the review, we are happy to hear that you enjoy the game! 💖🎉🙌

reviews.review_description:
The premise sounded good, but there are several glaring problems with the game.
1. You're stuck in the air high above your chair with no way to fix it. 
2. Level selection is almost impossible. I have to spam shoot the level chapter with both guns, and sometimes it works, but not often, and yes, I'm shooting at the middle. 
3. In the level that throws the balls like asteroids,  it's impossible to shoot them because the game never gives you the color you need to shoot the balls, but once every 3 or 4 shots. That's a lot of shooting at nothing just to change colors.  By the time you get the right color, you've been hit 5 or 6 times. Hope these things get fixed, or I'm likely to never play this again.

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Please update to 39.0, this newer version has instructions and a few improved features.
Happy gaming 😊

reviews.review_description: Looks excellent and it’s challenging with lots of levels. 👍

UPDATE:- After the mozt recent update, the game now responds to re-centering as it should and doesn't start me off facing backwards!
It also just seems to run faster and smoother overall, though I'm not sure if that's just in my head. 😅
All of the little added information pop-ups are nice, even teaching me 1 or 2 control features I didn't know existed, adding a nicer flow to the game.
The fdevelopers fid great and worked quickly on smoothing out their game, and i can't wait to see what more they bring to the table in the future if anything.

So I can whole heartedly recommend the game now for anyone wanting a fun color natching game with shooting mechanics and a space theme! 
It's a great time when you ant domething mire arcadey. 😁

OG:- The game ftom what I've played do far, is a good color matching game translated to VR very well. Though it's incredibly easy, I'm sure the difficulty really picks up later on (hopefully). 
My one grievance so far, and the one issue I noticed IMMEDIATELY upon just booting the game up for the very first time- the game is absolutely STUCK in one direction!
Re-centering using the Quest 3 doesn't do anything, neither does restarting it facing the opposite way... the gane, fir no reason at all, is just STUCK facing a very specific direction and blocks you from doing ANYTHING about it (a first in all my years of VR/ Quest gaming...).
I noticed this on the main menu, where I heard noises and talking, but was literally facing the SEAT I WAS VIRTUALLY SITTING IN. Nothing I could do but physically turn around, which in many cases (especially in a seated game like this), thats not something you want to deal with!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback! 😊 We're glad you're enjoying the update and that the improvements are making a difference. Stay tuned for more—we're excited to keep building on this experience. Happy gaming! 🚀

reviews.review_title: Can't get past the first board
reviews.review_description: I got the same problem I can't get past the first board myself I keep being on top of the chair but can't been down low enough to get to the chair

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Please update to 39.0, this newer version has instructions and a few improved features.

reviews.review_description: After the tip from the developer how to start the levels (shooting into center of the  hexagon) I can play. The alien gets a little annoying after a few levels. Good way to kill time.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback! 
We're glad you're enjoying the game and found the developer's tip helpful. We'll keep your notes in mind for future updates. Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: Cant get past the 1st screen because I have no idea what to do

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Because there are too many levels, you need to shoot in one of the clusters in the galaxy to expand the levels, then you can select a level to play. All of the selection and navigation are done by shooting, so please consider aiming well.

Also, you can contact us contact@tan-digital.com, 
We are curious to understand the reason why you are not able to proceed because our players have no issue at all progressing trough the game.

Kind regards,
